title: StarMaker [Addon for Galacticraft]
description: StarMaker will allow you to create your own systems, planets, moons for GalactiCraft 4 effortlessly!
body:
# [Main Page is on CurseForge!](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/starmaker)  Developed and Maintained by BlesseNtumble and AstroMaster.


## BETA VERSION Much is not available at the moment, but we'll fix it soon!

# About:

- Create your own magnificent worlds without programming knowledge!

- StarMaker will allow you to create your own systems, planets, moons for GalactiCraft 4 effortlessly!

- Create and share with your other worlds!

- Guide in #starmaker_guide channel our Discord. 

----------------------------

- Use in mod packs allowed.
- Use custom resource pack allowed. 
- Modification of the add-on is forbidden!
- Forbidden steal code or assets.
- Forbidden release or post mod on any other site without link on this page.
- Forbidden decompile jar files.
